title: Molecular biology techniques for fungal identification: focus on Aspergillus spp. (e-tutorial 3 + Webinar)
author: Cervini, Carla
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This tutorial summarises the main steps to identify through a molecular approach  Aspergillus  species isolated from food samples. It starts with introducing the  Aspergillus  genus, its economic and medical importance, and latest updates in taxonomy. The polyphasic approach for  Aspergillus  identification was introduced based on Samson et al., 2014. An overview on each of the stage to conduct molecular identification is provided, including examples of different DNA extraction protocols, PCR analysis with  Aspergillus  species recommended primers, Sanger’s sequencing, and interpretation of BLAST results.
